name: Peach Rhubarb Jam
recipeIngredient: 2 quarts sliced fresh rhubarb (1 inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sliced or fresh rhubarb and sugar; allow to stand overnight.
2. Transfer the mixture to a large saucepan and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes. Meanwhile, dice peaches and add with filling to the saucepan; return to boiling.
4. Remove from heat, add gelatin, and stir until dissolved.
5. Spoon into canning jars or freezer containers. Cool completely.
6. Refrigerate or freeze. Yield: About 7 half-pints
SOURCE: Darlene Desotel, Monona, IA, Country Woman Magazine Mar/Apr 93
